title: polygala alpestris subsp. meridionalis
intro: Polygala alpestris subsp. meridionalis, also known as the Southern Alpine Milkwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Polygala alpestris subsp. meridionalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support respiratory health.
